metadata.description: Guardrails and craft for coding agents. Deterministic hooks where judgment isn't needed, sharp skills where it is.

plugins.name: tokenlock
plugins.description: Design-token enforcement hooks: catches hardcoded colors and raw Tailwind palette utilities on every write, and suggests the matching token from your own token files.

plugins.name: no-slop
plugins.description: Technical writing without the machine-prose tells: an evidence-over-adjectives craft skill, a deterministic sloplint checker, and a voice extractor that builds a personal voice skill from your real writing.

plugins.name: tailwind-v4-tokens
plugins.description: Tailwind v4 theming knowledge: @theme vs :root, token-first dark mode, the spacing-scale shadowing trap, @apply in scoped styles, and v3 migration review.

plugins.name: agent-audit
plugins.description: Read-only security audit of your agent config: hijacked-hook patterns, permission creep, plaintext MCP endpoints, inline credentials, world-writable configs. Every check maps to a documented attack.

plugins.name: install-gate
plugins.description: PreToolUse gate on package installs: blocks typosquats and install-time code execution, flags hallucinated package names for verification. npm/pnpm/yarn/bun, pip, cargo. Offline heuristics.

plugins.name: receipts
plugins.description: Evidence-linked summaries where every claim traces to a verbatim quote, plus a checker that verifies quotes against their sources and catches the subtle case where a quote was reworded (ALTERED).

plugins.name: zod-first-tools
plugins.description: Build LLM tool definitions and MCP servers from one Zod schema instead of two: provider-specific derivation patterns plus a linter that flags a hand-written JSON Schema sitting next to a Zod schema.

plugins.name: readme-that-sells
plugins.description: Write and audit developer-tool READMEs and launch copy that convert: the what-is-it / does-it-work / can-I-try-it funnel, plus a structural auditor that measures time-to-install and time-to-first-example.
